name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Host a watch party with Fair Fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
This documentary exposes what we've known all along: the basic constitutional right to vote continues to be under siege in America, particularly for voters of color. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa503/34a064cc/18905401/703181c/37600625/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Mark it down on your calendar: Wednesday, September 25. That's the day we're joining Brave New Films to host watch parties nationwide of their new film, _Suppressed: The Fight to Vote_. Last year, the race for Governor of Georgia was decided by 54,723 votes in an election marred by voter suppression and widespread irregularities. This new documentary brings to light personal stories from voters in Georgia and the very real efforts to suppress the vote we're seeing in Georgia and across the country. [**You can watch the trailer below, then sign up to host a watch party.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa503/34a064cc/18905401/703181d/37600625/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/watch-party?SOURCE=IE091119BNF") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa503/34a064cc/18905401/703181a/37600625/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://youtu.be/r_iVgccofB4") We know that our democracy is strongest when every voice can be heard, when every eligible citizen can cast a ballot and have faith that it will be fairly and accurately counted. To get there, we need to create a national conversation in Congress, in state legislatures, and in the media on voting rights, the realities of voter suppression, and the need for election reform. This documentary helps us do just that. [**Will you sign up to host a watch party on September 25? **](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa503/34a064cc/18905401/703181d/37600625/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/watch-party?SOURCE=IE091119BNF") By hosting a watch party for your community or your neighborhood, you can invite new folks to join the conversation on voting rights. We'll help you make it a success, and together, we can inspire nothing short of a national awakening around voting rights. We're in this together,
Team Fair Fight
---
**[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa503/34a064cc/18905401/703181b/37600625/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE091119BNF")**

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa503/34a064cc/18905401/7031818/37600625/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa503/34a064cc/18905401/7031819/37600625/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa503/34a064cc/18905401/7031826/37600625/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

name: Steve Chabot
subject: A Debate Worth Watching? Probably Not...
body:
Yet another Democrat debate, and more frightening wacky ideas... No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [A Debate Worth Watching? Probably Not...](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-j/)
The Democrats are gearing up for another lengthy presidential debate. In this week's blog, I save you the trouble of having to watch and offer up a better alternative! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [What's The Press Got Against Melania Trump?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-d/)
The First Lady's treatment by the mainstream press is, in my humble opinion, shameful. In this weeks' blog post, I explain how First Lady Melania Trump has been belittled, criticized, undermined and simply ignored! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Trump's Republican Rivals](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-u/)
An overwhelming majority of Republicans support Donald Trump's reelection to the presidency. But not all. I'm on the blog today talking about President Trump's Republican rivals and what I think their chances may be.

Click the link below to read this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [My Prediction - The Democrat Nominee for President Will Be...](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-n/)
So who's going to be Donald Trump's Democratic rival for the presidency this time around? The truth is, no one knows for sure. And Joe Biden has been the leader of the Democrat pack since even before he officially threw his hat into the ring back in April. But I think it's likely to be someone other than Joe. Here's my analysis.

Click the link below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdskjdk-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Something big is happening today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=3041%2E150750%2EEgs1B-)
**Bernie is asking people across the country to do something important today: Please add your name at the link below to say you support his campaign to win the presidency and to transform our country.**
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/endorse**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em-stand-with-bernie?source=em190911-2-react&refcode2=3041.150750.Egs1B-&t=2&akid=3041%2E150750%2EEgs1B-)
[](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em-stand-with-bernie?source=em190911-2-react&refcode2=3041.150750.Egs1B-&t=3&akid=3041%2E150750%2EEgs1B-)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em-stand-with-bernie?source=em190911-2-react&refcode2=3041.150750.Egs1B-&t=4&akid=3041%2E150750%2EEgs1B-)
Friends -
The only way we will win this election and create a government and an economy that works for all of us is with a grassroots movement — the likes of which has never been seen before.
All of us have a role in that effort. And it starts with being willing to say that you’re in this fight. That sends a very important message.
That’s why, today, thousands of volunteers for our campaign are reaching out to millions of voters across the country and asking them to do something important.
**Something I want to ask you to do right now:**
[**Add your name if you support our campaign to win this primary, defeat Donald Trump, and transform our country. This is important and will give us a good sense of where we’re at.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em-stand-with-bernie/?source=em190911-2-react&refcode2=3041.150750.Egs1B-&t=5&akid=3041%2E150750%2EEgs1B-)
Our campaign is about taking on the powerful special interests that dominate our economic and political life.
You know who I am talking about:
I am talking about Wall Street, the health insurance companies, the drug companies, the fossil fuel industry, the military industrial complex, the private prison industry and the large multinational corporations that exert such an enormous influence over everything.
Make no mistake about it. They have unlimited amounts of money to spend on campaigns and lobbying and have huge influence over the media and political parties.
But we are going to beat them.
We are going to beat them because we have an unprecedented grassroots movement powered by PEOPLE.
And that starts with you.
**So please, add your name to say you endorse our campaign:**
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/endorse**](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em-stand-with-bernie/?source=em190911-2-react&refcode2=3041.150750.Egs1B-&t=6&akid=3041%2E150750%2EEgs1B-)
They may have the money and power, but we have the people.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/em-stand-with-bernie/?source=em190911-2-react&refcode2=3041.150750.Egs1B-&t=7&akid=3041%2E150750%2EEgs1B-)

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. If you need to, [**unsubscribe here**](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=8&akid=3041%2E150750%2EEgs1B-). You can also [sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=9&akid=3041%2E150750%2EEgs1B-). We hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=10&refcode2=3041_150750_Egs1B-&akid=3041%2E150750%2EEgs1B-).
Submit this form to [update your contact information](https://act.berniesanders.com/signup/update-info/?t=11&akid=3041%2E150750%2EEgs1B-).

Friend,

We can't wait for tonight. The Top 10 Corrupt Liberals will take the stage at 8 PM tonight and debate on which of their plans would ruin our country the most.

Here's a list of the top things we expect to hear the Democrats debate tonight:
* Banning plastic straws
* Destroying all fossil fuels
* Banning fracking everywhere
* Raising your taxes to pay for illegal criminals
* No more offshore drilling - taking jobs away from tens of thousands of people
* Light bulb ban
* And, no more cheeseburgers!

We wish we were joking, but these are the Liberal's top ten candidates for President of the United States...

Before these wacky candidates start arguing about who's WORSE for America, _President Trump wants to get your critical input on a few important matters and has asked to see all responses submitted before the Dem Debate tonight._

name: Joe Sestak
subject: "Unmatched foreign policy credentials" -- WMUR, New Hampshire TV
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
New Hampshire's WMUR TV profiled me during my visit to the Granite State, saying: "**Sestak said he brings foreign policy experience to the table in a way that no other Democrat can. The retired three-star vice admiral served in the Navy for three decades and was director of defense policy for the National Security Council under President Bill Clinton.** "
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9871800/98332130/896981402?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTU0MGMxMi02ZWQ1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eg-P8_GEnb9r2a7xZo9MyfkMb8nxWT2CVJVFPtKDO-I=&emci=b4fb6420-fad4-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=65540c12-6ed5-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=250798)**
I was asked why my unparalleled experience in the military and in foreign policy mattered, and responded: "**It is this breadth and depth of global experience, an understanding that if you're ever going to use our military, you'd better understand how it's going to end before you think it's wise to begin, that matters** "
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9871804/98332142/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTU0MGMxMi02ZWQ1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Eg-P8_GEnb9r2a7xZo9MyfkMb8nxWT2CVJVFPtKDO-I=&refcode=em09122019nh)**
WMUR asked if I supported negotiations with the Taliban: "How else are you going to end a war?" I responded. Nevertheless, as WMUR reported: "he believes the president has weakened national security, and said it's **time for a less ideological commander-in-chief**. 'I'm very much a person who believes, like in the Navy, you look at the facts and then resolve the problem,' Sestak said."

clean_body: Peter, New Hampshire's WMUR TV profiled me during my visit to the Granite State, saying: "Sestak said he brings foreign policy experience to the table in a way that no other Democrat can. The retired three-star vice admiral served in the Navy for three decades and was director of defense policy for the National Security Council under President Bill Clinton. " I was asked why my unparalleled experience in the military and in foreign policy mattered, and responded: "It is this breadth and depth of global experience, an understanding that if you're ever going to use our military, you'd better understand how it's going to end before you think it's wise to begin, that matters " WMUR asked if I supported negotiations with the Taliban: "How else are you going to end a war?" I responded. Nevertheless, as WMUR reported: "he believes the president has weakened national security, and said it's time for a less ideological commander-in-chief. 'I'm very much a person who believes, like in the Navy, you look at the facts and then resolve the problem,' Sestak said." This nation needs a President and Commander-in-Chief who understands our changing world and can restore US leadership and convene our allies and friends to advance a progressive national security policy that benefits America and the world's collective good. name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: You won’t believe this.
body:
| | Peter, They are vying for your vote! The brother-in-law to presidential candidate Pete Buttigieg is calling on the mayor of South Bend Indiana to “repent” for trying to use the Bible to justify late-term abortion. Glezman claims his brother-in-law is “weaponizing” Christian beliefs. In a recent interview, Buttigieg said the Bible speaks of life beginning with “breath” and therefore abortion is acceptable. Do you get the impression that the wrong member of this family got into politics? “Mayor Pete” may not have done much for the city of South Bend, but he’s touted as having the gift of “narrative,” the enviable, if not always admirable, ability to craft a political message and communicate it. This is what he’s trying to do, Glezman believes, with his use of Christian terminology to defend his leftist policies. He’s walking a line to try to appeal to the evangelical community while also falling into line with Democrat dogma. Pete Buttigieg won’t be the only candidate trying to win Christians votes with lies that contradict the truths found in scripture. **[THIS is exactly why we must equip Christians with biblical principles to vote. And it _’_ _s why we need your help at My Faith Votes to reach non-voting Christians_](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190912apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190912apl01nd&n=1).** I sincerely believe this information will disturb other Americans as much as it disturbed me. I pray it will serve as a warning that we must return to the values of faith and morality that sustained America for so long. **The answer to our nation’s problems is Christians waking up and making a bold declaration of their faith by standing for biblical values.** In 2020, My Faith Votes has the ambitious goal to reach one million non-voting Christians to vote. When 90-million Christians stand united, a bold message will be sent that we reject the lie claiming God, morality, faith, and religion are irrelevant. Instead, we will usher in the values of our faith back to every area of the public square. We have a proven plan to activate Christians that will write history with record number turnout. But we need your financial help to make this happen. **[Please prayerfully consider making a gift today to activate and equip non-voting Christians in 2020](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190912apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190912apl01nd&n=2).** These frightening anti-God and anti-life trends in our nation will not be reversed unless voting Christians take notice - and join us in our mission to reach others. This is the only way to protect vulnerable lives in the womb, uphold marriage and gender as God defined, and ensure religious freedom remains for future generations. Thank you for faithfully standing for our values. Every gift makes a difference not only for America today, but for faith and freedom in the future. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190912apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190912apl01nd&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190912apl01nd&n=4)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190912apl01nd&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190912apl01nd&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190912apl01nd&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190912apl01nd&n=8)

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Visa and Mastercard
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

Credit cards have enabled many of America’s mass shootings in the last
decade.

For example, the man who shot up a movie theater in Aurora, Colorado, got
away with buying $11,000 in assault rifles, gas masks, grenades, and ammo.
He just charged it to his credit card.

However inadvertent or deliberate, credit card companies and banks profit
off of those who terrorize our communities. And we know that in this
moment, no one can sit on the sidelines. Everyone has a responsibility to
do their part.

These companies are no exception. That’s why today we’re calling on the
financial industry to do their part to cut off the sales of these weapons
of war.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/stop-selling-weapons-of-war/?source=ema20190912-54701&t=1001&akid=54701%2E444211%2EYh0Wic ]Will you sign our petition to tell the banks and credit companies to
stop supporting the sales of weapons of war? It’s important to add your
name.

We’re calling on banks and credit card companies to:

1. Refuse to provide services for the sales of assault weapons.

2. Stop processing transactions for gun sales online or at gun shows
without background checks.

3. Stop doing business with gun or ammo manufacturers who produce or
sell assault weapons.

If this Congress and this president won’t act, the least the financial
industry could do is stop profiting off of sales of these weapons. If
enough of us speak out, they’ll consider it. That’s why it’s so important
for us to get as many signatures on this petition as possible.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/stop-selling-weapons-of-war/?source=ema20190912-54701&t=1002&akid=54701%2E444211%2EYh0Wic ]Can you make sure your name gets added to this petition before we send
it to Visa, Mastercard, and the big banks?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/stop-selling-weapons-of-war/?source=ema20190912-54701&t=1003&akid=54701%2E444211%2EYh0Wic ]Add your name

The financial industry has played a part in government efforts to stop the
illegal drug trade, trafficking, and other violent crimes. It's time for
them to step up now and stop the easy flow of assault weapons to
terrorists.

If enough of us make our voices heard now, we stand a chance to make that
happen. Thank you for adding your name to our petition today.

Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190912footer&t=1004&refcode2=54701_444211_Yh0Wic&akid=54701%2E444211%2EYh0Wic

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=54701%2E444211%2EYh0Wic

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Sign my petition and tell Donald Trump to rescind his domestic gag rule and fully fund Planned Parenthood →
body:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c13/4bef7a87/68a649f3/287f04ef/3022241104/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friend,
Reproductive rights are facing an all-out attack in this country. And the Trump Administration recently delivered another blow:
**Planned Parenthood was forced to give up its Title X funding thanks to the Trump Administration.**
Trump's "domestic gag rule" - which denies federal funding to clinics that provide or refer patients for abortions - recently went into effect, leaving Planned Parenthood ineligible for federal funding if it continued its vital work providing comprehensive health care to women.
Planned Parenthood is an immensely valuable resource to women (and men!) across this country. Its doctors, nurses, and clinicians provide reproductive health services, primary care, and cancer screenings to _millions_ who otherwise might not get the care they need.
In Maine, thousands of people rely on Planned Parenthood to access comprehensive, affordable health care. Planned Parenthood being forced to give up its Title X funding could lead to fewer Mainers being able to access that care.
But Trump doesn't care. He's absolutely willing to deny women health care in order to score political points with his base.
**Well, we won 't let them turn back the clock on women's rights. Not without a fight:**
[**Sign my petition to demand the Trump Administration rescind its "domestic gag rule." A woman's right to choose is still sacred law in this country, and our president should remember that.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c13/4bef7a87/68a649f3/287f04ee/3022241104/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTItZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/title-x-petition?source=em190912-full")
I know this fight can feel never-ending. It's easy to get disheartened.
Our opponents are hoping we get tired and give up the fight. But I know this group will never let them win that way.
Yours,
_Sara_
****[SIGN THE PETITION](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c13/4bef7a87/68a649f3/287f04ee/3022241104/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTItZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/title-x-petition?source=em190912-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c13/4bef7a87/68a649f3/287f04ed/3022241104/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c13/4bef7a87/68a649f3/287f04ec/3022241104/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Michael Bennet
subject: tonight's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends, the DNC has blocked me from tonight's debate so I'm bringing my message directly to you, and I want to be clear:

[_The DNC _does not_ choose our Democratic nominee._](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf9b/134673f2/b6c067f/69963f57/1156515830/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**Grassroots supporters and voters like you choose our Democratic nominee.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf9b/134673f2/b6c067f/69963f57/1156515830/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

With more than 140 days until the Iowa caucus, my campaign isn't slowing down because of arbitrary rules cooked up in a backroom of the DNC. That's why I'm in Iowa this weekend, talking to caucusgoers about the challenges they face and how we can move our country forward together.

I've won two tough elections in a purple state while the Tea Party, Freedom Caucus, and Trump were on the rise, and I didn't compromise my progressive values to do it.

[**I did it by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country - and I'm going to do it again.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf9b/134673f2/b6c067f/69963f57/1156515830/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

This campaign is persisting, fueled by thousands of grassroots donations from friends and supporters like you.

[If you're with me, will you donate any amount to help fuel this campaign to victory? Send the DNC a message that the voters decide our nominee -- not some operatives in a backroom.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf9b/134673f2/b6c067f/69963f57/1156515830/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B1_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: How you can fight back against violent rhetoric
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d00a/6cd27893/51c2f26c/15870949/659596394/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | This is unacceptable.

You'll recall that Mark Kelly is running for the U.S. Senate in Arizona. He's a decorated astronaut and the husband of former Congresswoman Gabby Giffords, who was gravely injured at a mass shooting at a "Congress on your Corner" event. **Now, in Arizona, the leader of the Republican Party said in a fundraising message that they're planning to stop Mark Kelly "dead in his tracks".**

That kind of violent rhetoric has no place in our democracy. And especially when we're talking about a victim of horrific gun violence.

There is no doubt that this kind of language puts lives in danger.

[**I'm asking you to stand up to these dangerous tactics. Donate $3 right now and show them that if they use violent language, we won't roll over. We won't take this lightly.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d00a/6cd27893/51c2f26c/15870946/659596394/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/merkley-kelly?refcode=2019-09-12-kelly&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Ivanka Trump promised childcare support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Ivanka Trump was supposedly going to be the voice of reason in this White House, advocating for children and working women. She said she would push for more family leave and more rights for working mothers \-- unsurprisingly, she hasn't done any of this. The U.S. is the wealthiest nation in the world, and yet it ranks low globally in many metrics, especially in terms of childcare. We don't have universal paid family leave, kindergarten, or affordable options for childcare. In fact, U.S. families use 23.1% of their income on childcare, compared to 11.8% for families in similar countries. Across the U.S., childcare options are dwindling, making affordable options for families few and far between \-- some childcare providers have 18-month waitlists and are no longer accepting vouchers and other financial assistance programs, further driving up the cost for American families. [**Early childcare is critical to a kid 's upbringing -- it allows them to jumpstart learning and sets them up to better succeed in school. Add your name to ours and tell Congress that it's time we supported American families; make childcare affordable for all Americans now!**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd74/6e9863e8/14b41173/1db0c4fe/928975817/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/affordable-childcare/wdtop/") Thank you for standing up for families across the country, The WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd74/6e9863e8/14b41173/1db0c4fe/928975817/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/affordable-childcare/wdtop/")
---

name: Andrew Childs
subject: Join the team this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
We're less than two months out from Election Day, and that means we need all hands on deck to help us get out the vote for Andy and Jacqueline.
|
---

| | Peter,

We're less than two months out from Election Day, and that means we need all hands on deck to help us get out the vote for Andy and Jacqueline. There's a reason national reporters ranked this race as a toss-up -- it's because of our incredible volunteers and their commitment to talking to their friends and neighbors about this election.

When we say that we're building the biggest field organization in Kentucky history, we mean it. We've talked to thousands of prospective voters, and we need your help to talk to even more.

**This Saturday is a huge day of action for this campaign.** Our volunteers are going to be making phone calls and talking to voters all across the Commonwealth about the Beshear/Coleman vision to move Kentucky forward. And the best part? **[You can be part of the team by making phone calls -- you don't even have to leave your couch!](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a98/ad6dc73/142801d3/db47160/1541582785/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://www.mobilize.us/kydems/event/108304/?utm_source=20190912ntemail")**

**Will you join us on this big day of action?** Hundreds of Kentuckians are already committed to joining us to talk to voters for a few hours on Saturday. **[Sign up for a shift to be part of the team and talk to voters.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a98/ad6dc73/142801d3/db47160/1541582785/VEsE/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://www.mobilize.us/kydems/event/108304/?utm_source=20190912ntemail")**

We can't flip Kentucky blue without you!
Andrew

P.S. in case you missed it, **[here's that RSVP link again!](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a98/ad6dc73/142801d3/db47160/1541582785/VEsF/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://www.mobilize.us/kydems/event/108304/?utm_source=20190912ntemail")** | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a98/ad6dc73/142801d3/db47161/1541582785/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MSJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?refcode=20190912dbnl__251__&amount=5")**

name: Elisa
subject: All eyes on Houston tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9882259/98424354/979390018?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTRhM2VlMS05MmQ1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SbB3dmySOOiI-ZKNo_2Xq_OoljOYCAFar15y-P3zx-o=&emci=884a3ee1-92d5-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=894a3ee1-92d5-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=8311474)
Peter,
All eyes will be on Houston tonight as 10 presidential candidates step on to the debate stage. It’s a good reminder of how critical Houston and Texas will be in the 2020 elections.
While we are zeroed in on flipping the TX-02 Congressional seat next fall, we know that much of the nation is focused on who will have the opportunity to challenge our current President.
I would love to know who has made it to the top of your list for the White House, Peter.**[Can you take a moment to fill out this survey and let me know? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9882260/98424355/530059539?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTRhM2VlMS05MmQ1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SbB3dmySOOiI-ZKNo_2Xq_OoljOYCAFar15y-P3zx-o=&emci=884a3ee1-92d5-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&emdi=894a3ee1-92d5-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349&ceid=8311474)**
Looking forward to learning more about you and your priorities for 2020.
Thanks,
Elisa

While we are zeroed in on flipping the TX-02 Congressional seat next fall, we know that much of the nation is focused on who will have the opportunity to challenge our current President. I would love to know who has made it to the top of your list for the White House, Peter. Looking forward to learning more about you and your priorities for 2020. Thanks, Elisa Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress Elisa Cardnell for Congress PO Box 667253 Houston, TX 77266 United States

subject: Get to Know Dan Crenshaw: Combat Veteran & Congressman
body:
Get to know Congressman Dan Crenshaw, and you'll meet a man of remarkable courage, patriotism and forgiveness. You'll also meet one of three... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/get-to-know-dan-crenshaw-combat-veteran-congressman?e=1acd9bb3d6)

---
| **Get to Know Dan Crenshaw:**
Congressman, Combat Vet & Fall Dinner Special Guest
Get to know Congressman Dan Crenshaw, and you'll meet a man of remarkable courage, patriotism and forgiveness. You'll also meet one of three remarkable speakers we have coming to Indiana for the [2](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=f470f5a8b7&e=1acd9bb3d6)[019 Team Holcomb Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=928b16d5c6&e=1acd9bb3d6).

**You likely first heard of Congressman Crenshaw last November when he was the subject of offensive mocking on Saturday Night Live. Do you remember what happened next? Congressman Crenshaw [went on the program the next week](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=c98aca68e5&e=1acd9bb3d6) and taught us all a remarkable lesson about forgiving others ([watch the video here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=20811faccf&e=1acd9bb3d6)). **

Here's what he said,_"There are a lot of lessons to learn here, not just that the left and right can still agree on some things, but also this: Americans can forgive one another. We can remember what brings us together as a country and still see the good in each other."_

Dan Crenshaw grew up in Texas, and while in college he joined the Naval Reserves Officers Training Corps. After graduation, he served as a United States Navy Seal for ten years, with five tours of duty in Iraq, Afghanistan, Bahrain and South Korea. While in Afghanistan for his third deployment, he was injured by the detonation of an improvised explosive device. He lost his right eye and required surgery to save the vision in his left eye. Outstandingly, he then went on to serve two more tours!

Congressman Crenshaw was awarded two Bronze Stars (one with valor), the Purple Heart, and the Navy Commendation Medal with Valor, among others, for his remarkable service, courage and sacrifice. And then in November 2018, he was elected to the United States House of Representative to serve his home state.

**You're not going to want to miss hearing this remarkable American hero's story for yourself! Make sure you[RSVP now for the 2019 Team Holcomb Fall Dinne](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=b527e4d547&e=1acd9bb3d6)[r](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=447e5d9f6a&e=1acd9bb3d6), and join Congressman Crenshaw, Congressman Brian Mast and Indiana's own Congressman Jim Baird for this very special event. **

---
| [Click here to RSVP for the Team Holcomb Fall Dinner!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d921169173&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Click here to RSVP for the Team Holcomb Fall Dinner!")

name: Andrew Young
subject: We’re endorsing Teresa for the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9882431/98425282/1754391651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTY1NTgyYy05NWQ1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZKl4ReWMYiPyIXs3ZV27c-_pyfLvh1BdbwHTYswFPhY=&refcode=em091119-b&noskip=true&refcode2=1565582c-95d5-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349)** Friend,

I know how tough it is breaking down barriers. Marching with Dr. King throughout the South in the 1960s, we encountered bitter opposition in our struggle for equality. But we prevailed, and passed the Civil Rights Act and the Voting Rights Act.

Today the right to vote is under attack, but Georgia has the opportunity to break down another barrier as we fight to preserve the hard-fought gains we have won through generations of struggle.

**Carolyn and I are proud to endorse Teresa Tomlinson as the next U.S. Senator from Georgia** not only because she would be the first woman elected to the Senate in Georgia’s long history. We firmly believe Teresa is the change we need to see in Washington, DC.

[**Please join Carolyn and I in supporting Teresa for U.S. Senate by sending her a contribution today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/9882432/98425283/1754391651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTY1NTgyYy05NWQ1LWU5MTEtYmNkMC0yODE4Nzg0ZDQzNDkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZKl4ReWMYiPyIXs3ZV27c-_pyfLvh1BdbwHTYswFPhY=&refcode=em091119-b&noskip=true&refcode2=1565582c-95d5-e911-bcd0-2818784d4349)

Teresa is a fighter for criminal justice reform, beginning with the decriminalization, legalization, and regulation of marijuana that includes expungement and commutation for those unjustly charged with crimes.

Her plan doesn’t stop there – Teresa understands that we also need to make capital available and prioritize investing in communities that have been most impacted by the War on Drugs.

Teresa rejects corporate PAC money because she holds herself accountable to you, not giant corporations, and depends on your support, not theirs.

She is on a mission to restore the Voting Rights Act and protect the integrity of our elections from interference.

She sees the urgency of raising the minimum wage to $15 an hour and getting universal healthcare by improving the Affordable Care Act, not sabotaging and stonewalling as Mitch McConnell’s Senate has done.

Teresa has been a lifelong fighter for the LGBTQ community and will extend long-overdue citizenship to our nation’s Dreamers.

I could go on, but suffice it to say that the urgency of this election could not be any higher – especially here in Georgia. We have not one but TWO U.S. Senate seats up for grabs, and defeating David Perdue will determine who controls the Senate after 2020.

**That’s why Carolyn and I are asking all Georgians and Democrats across the country to extend your full support to Teresa in this moment. Please make a donation to her campaign right now so we can bring the change we need to Washington.** | Express Donate: | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 'We Pay a Debt of Honor': VP Pence, Others Remember Flight 93 Victims
body:
"Not far from where Vice President Mike Pence stood Wednesday morning at the Flight 93 National Memorial stands its 93-foot-tall Tower of Voices..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4533cd060e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **'We Pay a Debt of Honor': VP Pence, Others Remember Flight 93 Victims**

“Not far from where Vice President Mike Pence stood Wednesday morning at the Flight 93 National Memorial stands its 93-foot-tall Tower of Voices, where wind chimes of different musical notes symbolize each of the 40 individuals who thwarted another attack on Sept. 11, 2001,” Julian Routh writes in the _Pittsburgh Post-Gazette_.

“Marking the 18th anniversary of the 2001 terror attacks, the vice president delivered remarks at the Flight 93 memorial, paying tribute to the passengers and crew members who rose up against the plane's hijackers and ‘met unspeakable evil with selfless heroism and American strength,’ he said.”

Yesterday morning, President Donald J. Trump and the First Lady led a moment of silence at the White House alongside families of September 11 victims.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f5dedf2231&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump, speaking Wednesday at a memorial ceremony at the Pentagon, said the 9/11 terrorist attacks are ‘seared into our souls’ and offered the family members of those killed on that day 18 years ago ‘our unwavering loyalty,’” Mark Moore writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c3aaeb3cc2&e=3ee4985eea). “For every American who lived through that day, the September 11th attack is seared into our soul. It was a day filled with shock, horror, sorrow and righteous fury,” the President said.
---
|
---
| “American farmers continue to feed the world as they have since our nation’s humble beginnings,” West Virginia Agriculture Commissioner Kent Leonhardt writes in the [_West Virginia Record_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f229bc4e59&e=3ee4985eea) _._ “The president’s efforts to level the playing field are a welcome change from administrations’ past and [it’s] time Congress shows the same support to our farmers by ratifying the USMCA agreement. We can no longer allow foreign nations to use the American farmer as a trade pawn. The farming community has waited long enough.”
---
|
---
| In the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c59435aafd&e=3ee4985eea), Eddie Scarry points out how all of CNN’s big “mistakes” these days conveniently run in one direction: anti-Trump. CNN’s latest spy-gate falsehood “was only the latest in a series of major screw-ups by the cable network, some that it has admitted to and some that it hasn’t. And by what I’m sure is pure coincidence, all of the awful reporting has taken place in negative stories about the president.”
---
|
---
| “The number of Americans filing applications for unemployment benefits fell to a five-month low last week, suggesting the labor market remains strong,” [_Reuters_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc27750f93&e=3ee4985eea) reports. “Initial claims for state unemployment benefits declined 15,000 to a seasonally adjusted 204,000 for the week ended Sept. 7, the lowest level since April, the Labor Department said.”
---
|

clean_body: "Not far from where Vice President Mike Pence stood Wednesday morning at the Flight 93 National Memorial stands its 93-foot-tall Tower of Voices..." | | | | | | | 'We Pay a Debt of Honor': VP Pence, Others Remember Flight 93 Victims “Not far from where Vice President Mike Pence stood Wednesday morning at the Flight 93 National Memorial stands its 93-foot-tall Tower of Voices, where wind chimes of different musical notes symbolize each of the 40 individuals who thwarted another attack on Sept. 11, 2001,” Julian Routh writes in the Pittsburgh Post-Gazette. “Marking the 18th anniversary of the 2001 terror attacks, the vice president delivered remarks at the Flight 93 memorial, paying tribute to the passengers and crew members who rose up against the plane's hijackers and ‘met unspeakable evil with selfless heroism and American strength,’ he said.” Yesterday morning, President Donald J. Trump and the First Lady led a moment of silence at the White House alongside families of September 11 victims. | | “President Trump, speaking Wednesday at a memorial ceremony at the Pentagon, said the 9/11 terrorist attacks are ‘seared into our souls’ and offered the family members of those killed on that day 18 years ago ‘our unwavering loyalty,’” Mark Moore writes in the . “For every American who lived through that day, the September 11th attack is seared into our soul. It was a day filled with shock, horror, sorrow and righteous fury,” the President said. | | “American farmers continue to feed the world as they have since our nation’s humble beginnings,” West Virginia Agriculture Commissioner Kent Leonhardt writes in the . “The president’s efforts to level the playing field are a welcome change from administrations’ past and [it’s] time Congress shows the same support to our farmers by ratifying the USMCA agreement. We can no longer allow foreign nations to use the American farmer as a trade pawn. The farming community has waited long enough.” | | In the , Eddie Scarry points out how all of CNN’s big “mistakes” these days conveniently run in one direction: anti-Trump. CNN’s latest spy-gate falsehood “was only the latest in a series of major screw-ups by the cable network, some that it has admitted to and some that it hasn’t. And by what I’m sure is pure coincidence, all of the awful reporting has taken place in negative stories about the president.” | | “The number of Americans filing applications for unemployment benefits fell to a five-month low last week, suggesting the labor market remains strong,” reports. “Initial claims for state unemployment benefits declined 15,000 to a seasonally adjusted 204,000 for the week ended Sept. 7, the lowest level since April, the Labor Department said.” | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name if you agree: We need to expand Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We need to expand Social Security. For years, I've helped lead the fight in Congress to make it happen. And I've got a new plan for the biggest and most progressive increase in Social Security... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529d44/45c30650/130dc58ec/668808be/1801539295/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Let's face it: It's too hard to save enough for a decent retirement -- and it's only getting harder.

Wages are barely budging, and the cost of living keeps going up. Pensions are becoming more rare, so more people are counting on Social Security to fund a decent retirement.

But Social Security benefits just aren't high enough. Fourteen percent of seniors live in poverty. In the richest country on the planet, millions of seniors cut pills, delay necessary home and car repairs, and skip meals to save money.

And right now, too many politicians in Washington are only debating whether to cut Social Security by a little or a lot. But not me.

**We need to _expand_ Social Security. For years, I've helped lead the fight in Congress to make it happen. And I've got a new plan for the biggest and most progressive increase in Social Security benefits in nearly half a century. It will...**
* Immediately increase everyone's benefits by $200 a month
* Cut the senior poverty rate by 68%
* Update outdated rules to increase benefits for women, low-income families, people with disabilities, public sector workers, and people of color

And we'll pay for it by asking the richest 2% of families to pay their fair share into the program.

**[If you agree that we need to expand Social Security, join the fight to make it happen-- add your name to support our new plan today.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529d44/45c30650/130dc58ec/668808a0/1801539295/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUozM1BfUkxUX1NTQV9FXzIwMTkwOTEyX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-ssa?source=EMJ33P_RLT_SSA_E_20190912_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

My plan starts with a $200 increase in everyone's monthly Social Security check. That's $2,400 more a year for the nearly 64 million Social Security beneficiaries in America today -- and for every future Social Security beneficiary.

That's money for a prescription, gas, food, or a trip to see the grandkids.

We'll also plug holes in the program to make sure we're delivering fairer benefits in retirement -- and not doubling down on the disparities that people faced in their careers.

My plan modernizes Social Security so it better reflects the work of women and people of color, giving them the higher benefits they deserve.

It gives people credit towards higher Social Security benefits for taking time out of the workforce to care for a child or an elderly relative or a relative with a disability -- disproportionately affecting women, people of color, and recent immigrants -- because caregiving is valuable work even if you don't get paid for it.

We'll give targeted increases to widows and widowers, including those with disabilities, because right now, the death of a spouse can mean the loss of a big chunk of Social Security benefits.

We'll also repeal provisions that slash benefits of many of our retired teachers, police officers, firefighters, and other public-sector workers. This will mean bigger monthly checks right away for more than two million retirees and their families.

For full-time students who have a parent who died or has a disability, my plan restores Social Security benefits and extends them until age 24 -- giving more people more of a chance to finish school while their benefits give them a base of financial security.

And it encourages workers to participate in registered apprenticeships and job training to prepare for in-demand jobs.

How do we pay for all of this? The wealthiest 2% of earners will pay their fair share of wages, and the top 2% of families will pay a piece of their investment income. On the whole, this plan will make sure Social Security is fully funded for another 35 years.

If we don't take action now, the retirement savings crisis will just get worse and worse.

**It 's time Washington stopped trying to slash Social Security benefits for people who've earned them. It took a grassroots movement to create Social Security in the first place -- and it'll take a grassroots movement to expand it.**

**[I'm going to keep fighting, but I can't do it alone. We need people like you to raise your voices in Pennsylvania and across the country. Add your name if you're in this fight all the way.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529d44/45c30650/130dc58ec/668808a0/1801539295/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUozM1BfUkxUX1NTQV9FXzIwMTkwOTEyX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-ssa?source=EMJ33P_RLT_SSA_E_20190912_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529d44/45c30650/130dc58ec/668808a0/1801539295/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUozM1BfUkxUX1NTQV9FXzIwMTkwOTEyX1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-ssa?source=EMJ33P_RLT_SSA_E_20190912_V1S2_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

If we don't reach our goal this week, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Ed is a thorn in President Trump 's side.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions who are standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.

_**[And that's exactly what Ed is doing every day. name: Mike Thompson
subject: getting back to work
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter - Congress is back in session, and my House Democratic colleagues and I are already getting right back to work advancing the People's Agenda.

**_And an important part of that agenda is universal background checks on all firearm sales._**

I'm proud to have introduced this bill, but since it was passed in the House, Mitch McConnell has refused to even bring it to a vote in the Senate. Americans want a commonsense solution to gun violence, so we must send a clear message now.

[Tell the Senate to make our communities safer and vote on universal background checks! ->](https://act.myngp.com/el/jplMBnAs258WHLpN7t8XpSAokRSia_aUj4gLLpn8Uxg=/PghEv94qRz7PO9Jd9caSnwA5QxXo4_NUn9ULHnlZGtw=)

**[DEMAND ACTION](https://act.myngp.com/el/jplMBnAs258WHLpN7t8XpSAokRSia_aUj4gLLpn8Uxg=/PghEv94qRz7PO9Jd9caSnwA5QxXo4_NUn9ULHnlZGtw=?firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)**
Our bipartisan bill has widespread public support. The American people are demanding action to help save lives, but McConnell won't budge.

**With Congress back in session, this is the perfect opportunity to renew our call to action.** [Add your name right away and join us in demanding the Senate vote on universal background checks.](https://act.myngp.com/el/jplMBnAs258WHLpN7t8XpSAokRSia_aUj4gLLpn8Uxg=/PghEv94qRz7PO9Jd9caSnwA5QxXo4_NUn9ULHnlZGtw=)

We can't let our communities continue to be harmed by senseless gun violence.

Thanks for making your voice heard.

Mike

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jplMBnAs258WHLpN7t8XpSAokRSia_aUj4gLLpn8Uxg=/PghEv94qRz7PO9Jd9caSnwA5QxXo4_NUn9ULHnlZGtw=)
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/jplMBnAs258WHLpN7t8XpSAokRSia_aUj4gLLpn8Uxg=/2J8JxLk3QFh3UAb3YL_xyoXFnCSV8cdebCmDmefkyAA=?amount=25&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_PT_90DO_190912_1_1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

_We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails,[_**click here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/jplMBnAs258WHLpN7t8XpSAokRSia_aUj4gLLpn8Uxg=/NZI71kZGh6QGmQJ53pCCYagC_miuaswpvGDRH8oowN0=)_

| Michael emailed you this morning about tonight's debate. We know you hate to see so many emails, but this is crucial.

We'll be straightforward: [**we need you to chip into Michael's campaign.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf97/134673f2/b67dbec/6996301b/3416925907/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B2_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Greg Pence
subject: it’s good for Indiana, it’s good for America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Pence Victory |

It’s good for Indiana, and it’s good for America. _That’s why I proudly support the new USMCA trade deal, which replaces NAFTA and protects the American workforce._
**President Trump has done his part on this legislation to Put America First and to put American workers first – and now it’s time for Congress to act.**
**So, why hasn’t Speaker Nancy Pelosi scheduled a vote on this commonsense legislation? Because she’s playing politics.**
The USMCA will add $68.2 billion to our economy and create 176,000 new jobs. This is not a red vs. blue issue, this is a red, white and blue issue that should unite all of us. I strongly believe that the USMCA is the right deal for the Sixth District, and for American workers from sea to shining sea.
**If you’re tired of Nancy Pelosi playing politics with our economy, I’m asking you to stand with President Trump and me today in support of the USMCA by adding your name as a citizen co-sponsor.**
Add your name at this personalized link to DEMAND that Nancy Pelosi schedule a vote on the USMCA: **[https://secure.gregpencevictory.com/usmca-57289/](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=0adf594366a24d4c83a30121fde9461a&_e=ESKb5Y1vOSkBBciYWVc_nsi_GU4onYui5TYN4m8DsUgwiUWgm2p-ATJZvVC00726kh6lOeyG_Q50UvHFCVJLXLRAvocb4TSxdGw60rL9Sgkl5WtU7JI8hNS9Ey2-ohA0JNvml6WLWeOGhPDDxCu6TtqEGueH6M7IHEKsLhcPsELB0ZURUxXAEJRTnQnN8irMx_10JRFlyThyxXVH9OC0-C0Z8KyZSOA365eoZ4BoXZp-FvtFYaXt9a_kpRU26pTNW7l6PDWCOzhmOF_HM9YyAqaIDkIT841lmOAVTPgLu-ddDZBQS3zJX0CQoh4LmMyH0_C6lRGQjBiYMARWQG-HIMd1e5Cf1BbhZYvsgbRK1GNpYVE5CC5hIdlssXTNOSPz8udtVw3hGpShf5_3pHoa133ceJ-YfrpQPPWVLmtUydg%3D)** [ **DEMAND that Nancy Pelosi schedule a vote on the USMCA** ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=0adf594366a24d4c83a30121fde9461a&_e=ESKb5Y1vOSkBBciYWVc_nsi_GU4onYui5TYN4m8DsUgwiUWgm2p-ATJZvVC00726kh6lOeyG_Q50UvHFCVJLXLRAvocb4TSxdGw60rL9Sgkl5WtU7JI8hNS9Ey2-ohA0JNvml6WLWeOGhPDDxCu6TtqEGueH6M7IHEKsLhcPsELB0ZURUxXAEJRTnQnN8irMx_10JRFlyThyxXVH9OC0-Jdr368C05txYxlFPHCpQs5iH6_QCoXQZqvTGeKGhqB16Vv-tJt7yphQiYIF6BhRlNQ8DUQs_b-LkRuAhwlEHwHbCE7TTaRYpal5bYolmtBd2hP6AIVQLizRssuLAfhfrT4jpbDu07om7DIGiNkvTPpMre3V8aUmEwfYklMdISKnVY_ZPCYVJcqnLbVyLBrPlfzzuCzxpnfCn7eklaC6vQ4%3D) Thank you, [ ](http://links.gregpenceforcongress.com/u/click?_t=c56a42391aaa4fc29673628e10310dda&_m=0adf594366a24d4c83a30121fde9461a&_e=ESKb5Y1vOSkBBciYWVc_nsi_GU4onYui5TYN4m8DsUgwiUWgm2p-ATJZvVC00726kh6lOeyG_Q50UvHFCVJLXLRAvocb4TSxdGw60rL9Sgkl5WtU7JI8hNS9Ey2-ohA0JNvml6WLWeOGhPDDxCu6TtqEGueH6M7IHEKsLhcPsELB0ZURUxXAEJRTnQnN8irMx_10JRFlyThyxXVH9OC0-JsbFwzc-3JB2bWRgadhXAfdNA93yQCVmwAu-t3apSJM6Fx0qj8-v9pl0Od9x2_yzhgCq5qJ7Rj3meCLIsrT8aGA9I_lqkYu_fEF695xBnr3WoD197K4tiMrGPx2OQZF_o5CrYPUGLznxRmrcAhjchzLY3ysKVlT48HnXyjBlrmhz1rGhR8bvc4uuZfTSOdYtuSq88LDn1-H0h02l7vOxII%3D) Greg Pence | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: RE: Trump's Rally
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Friend, this is a long email about President Trump's upcoming rally in our state. I really need you to read the whole thing -- _**[then pitch in $5 to help me counter his rally and keep this state in Democrats ' hands. >>](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190912_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")**_ President Trump is holding a massive campaign rally in New Mexico on Monday night. This has huge implications for our Senate race. His campaign has promised to spend big to turn New Mexico red. But I'm not going to let that happen. Last year, I led Democrats' successful effort to win the House Majority. I'm going to use those same strategies to win in New Mexico, beat Mitch McConnell and President Trump, and put the Senate back to work for the American people. I beat Trump in 2018 and I know we can beat him and his Republican Senate in 2020. That's been my focus every day since launching our campaign. But this Monday -- we're kicking it into overdrive. On Monday afternoon, before President Trump delivers a speech we know will be filled with empty promises for our families, hateful attacks on our communities, and a losing strategy for our economy, I will join New Mexicans from across our state for a unity rally to show the entire country and President Trump what we believe in. **I 'm asking you for $5 to help me promote our critical unity rally and counter President Trump's attacks. ** We can keep New Mexico blue -- but only if I have your support. | ****[**Chip in $5 >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190912_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****
---

New Mexico is a state that celebrates our diversity and communities. We're a state that stands up for women, children, and immigrants. And you better believe we're a state that stands up against gun violence, corruption, and hatred.

**_[On Monday I 'll stand proud as a New Mexican and I hope you'll take a stand with me by chipping in $5. >>](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190912_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

Best,
Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b5/18e32a7f/52c586b9/7be4ccbc/2634284650/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b5/18e32a7f/52c586b9/7be4ccbd/2634284650/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b5/18e32a7f/52c586b9/7be4ccb2/2634284650/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b5/18e32a7f/52c586b9/7be4ccb3/2634284650/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b5/18e32a7f/52c586b9/7be4ccb0/2634284650/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b5/18e32a7f/52c586b9/7be4ccb1/2634284650/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.
---

name: Mike Morley
subject: hearts and minds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Tonight, while the folks on stage in Houston are talking to themselves, Tim will be in New Hampshire speaking with a crowd of primary voters about the issues that matter to them.

That's right, folks, instead of engaging in political back and forth, Tim is going to be doing something New and Better: listening to people like **you** about health care, prescription drug prices, the economy -- you know, the real issues families like yours are facing.

[**But we need your help to keep Tim traveling from state to state so he can listen to as many folks as possible. Can you contribute $3 today to shore up our On-the-Ground fund?**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-for-the-people?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+But+we+need+your+help+to+keep+Tim+travel&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190912_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190912_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190912_1_1")

Tim doesn't believe in playing politics as usual. Quite frankly most people are sick of it. Instead, our team is putting in the hard work: visiting as many states as we can and speaking with Americans from all walks of life.

We plan on winning by fighting for our shared values and for every hardworking person across the country.

We need your help to be able to keep winning over hearts and minds: [**https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/for-the-people**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-for-the-people?recurring=true&amount=3&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-++httpssecuretimryanforamericacomforthepe&utm_campaign=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190912_1_1&source=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190912_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_FR_ACT_190912_1_1")

Morley

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

In just a bit, I’ll walk on stage for our next debate.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/33410?refcode=ema20190912-54764&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=54764%2E444211%2ERvHTyE ]This is a pivotal moment for us. Can you contribute to help us
demonstrate momentum heading into the debate?

Nights like tonight are full of pressure, and I’ve been given lots of good
advice. You have to demand enough time to talk; articulate your points;
come across as level-headed and passionate at the same time. There’s a lot
riding on everything.

But when I step off stage, I have just one barometer for success — and
that’s whether or not I represented you all well enough. All the
grassroots volunteers and donors who’ve stepped up for this campaign: Did
I do justice to your voice, your ideas, and your strength on stage?

I said from the beginning that I can’t do this on my own. Winning demands
a movement — the inspiration, ideas, and energy will have to come from all
of us. The best I can do is try to channel it on that debate stage
tonight.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/33410?refcode=ema20190912-54764&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=54764%2E444211%2ERvHTyE ]So before we take the stage, please give what you can. Every donation
adds up to the greatest grassroots campaign we can possibly build.

I’m going to work hard to make you proud tonight.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/33410?refcode=ema20190912-54764&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=54764%2E444211%2ERvHTyE ]Contribute

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20190912footer&t=1004&refcode2=54764_444211_RvHTyE&akid=54764%2E444211%2ERvHTyE

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=54764%2E444211%2ERvHTyE

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

I said from the beginning that I can’t do this on my own. Winning demands a movement — the inspiration, ideas, and energy will have to come from all of us. The best I can do is try to channel it on that debate stage tonight. [ ]So before we take the stage, please give what you can. Every donation adds up to the greatest grassroots campaign we can possibly build. I’m going to work hard to make you proud tonight. Beto [ ]Contribute Contribute to Beto's campaign:

I went to battle with them constantly, and I still am in the Senate. Hello Peter,
In case you missed it, I was on Fox Business this week discussing the new anti-trust case being brought against Google by several state Attorneys General. **My advice to them: be tough, and be ready. Click below to watch the interview.**

| Hey team! I'm Kevin, the official Cory 2020 photographer, here to give you the backstage scoop for tonight's debate. Debate nights are some of my favorite moments of the campaign, and I'm super lucky to be with Cory during these exciting times to capture everything that happens. Here are some of my favorites so far:
_Cory and friends backstage in Miami._
_Cory doing some last-minute prep before going out on stage._ My camera and I will be in Houston for the debate tonight, and I want you to be the first to see the big moments right as they happen. Here's where you can best follow along: 1\. Follow Cory on **[Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bf5/5fca0d19/74b9b9ce/291e021c/3541398921/VEsH/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker/")** , **[Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bf5/5fca0d19/74b9b9ce/291e021b/3541398921/VEsE/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/CoryBooker")** , and **[Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bf5/5fca0d19/74b9b9ce/291e021a/3541398921/VEsF/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/")**.
2\. Text **DEBATE** to **40203** for live updates from Team Cory.
3\. Watch the debate at 8 p.m. ET tonight online **[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bf5/5fca0d19/74b9b9ce/291e0219/3541398921/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://abcnews.go.com/Live/")** or on ABC News. Thanks for being a part of this team, and I hope you're all as excited as I am for Cory to crush it again tonight! Kevin Kevin Lowery
Photographer
Cory 2020 _PS: Don 't forget to Tweet about Cory during the debate with the hashtags #Cory2020 and #DemDebate!_ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_x_20190912_TB_20190912-x-TB-amplification-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Before the candidates take the stage for tonight's debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
We need to make sure that the fight for voting rights is front and center in tonight's #DemDebate. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa502/34a064cc/1893cdb4/70318a1/753753023/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - In 2013, the Supreme Court's ruling in _Shelby County v. Holder_ effectively gutted the Voting Rights Act. That meant the 2016 election was the first presidential election without the full protections of the Voting Rights Act in more than 50 years. And next November, when voters enter the voting booth to cast their ballot for the next President of the United States, we're likely to be left without the Voting Rights Act's safeguarding again. Tonight, millions of Americans will tune in to tonight's presidential debate aired by ABC News and Univision. And ten candidates will take the stage at one of the nation's largest historically black colleges and universities, Texas Southern University, in Houston. Our fight is about whether our leaders choose to hear every voice and count every vote. Because we know that voting is the bedrock on which our community's future and your ambitions are built. That's why we need to make sure that the fight for voting rights is front and center in tonight's #DemDebate. **Will you help us make it happen by joining the conversation on voting rights on social media?** [**Click to tweet:**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa502/34a064cc/1893cdb4/70318ae/753753023/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://ctt.ac/pF0RB") We can only make our nation's highest ideals real by voting. Tonight's #DemDebate needs to put the fight for voting rights and election reform at the center of the conversation. Because every voter deserves a #FairFight. Add your name if you agree: [http://bit.ly/31gMDQl](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa502/34a064cc/1893cdb4/70318af/753753023/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://bit.ly/31gMDQl") **Post on Facebook (copy/paste):** We can only make our nation's highest ideals real by voting. Tonight's #DemDebate needs to put the fight for voting rights and election reform at the center of the conversation. And when we all work together to ensure every eligible voter can access the ballot and have their vote fairly counted, the architects of voter suppression don't stand a chance. If you agree that every voter deserves a Fair Fight, add your name: [http://bit.ly/31u3yyU](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa502/34a064cc/1893cdb4/70318ac/753753023/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://bit.ly/31u3yyU") The stakes are too high. We need to ensure the fight for voting rights is front and center for every American. Because every voter and every candidate deserves a fair fight. \- Team Fair Fight P.s. Want to help us keep driving the national conversation on the need for election reform? [**Sign up to become a Digital Ambassador for Fair Fight, and we 'll share important articles or social media posts with you each month.**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa502/34a064cc/1893cdb4/70318ad/753753023/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/digital-ambassador?source=IE091219DEB")

And when we all work together to ensure every eligible voter can access the ballot and have their vote fairly counted, the architects of voter suppression don't stand a chance. If you agree that every voter deserves a Fair Fight, add your name: "" The stakes are too high. We need to ensure the fight for voting rights is front and center for every American. Because every voter and every candidate deserves a fair fight. \- Team Fair Fight P.s. Want to help us keep driving the national conversation on the need for election reform? "" "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2018 Fair Fight, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight are not tax-deductible. "" | | Paid for by Fair Fight

name: Team Bennet
subject: here's where we disagree
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends, there's no doubt that political players like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have damaged our faith in democracy.

But is it naive to believe that at this moment in American history we can restore public trust in our republic? Is it naive to believe that elected officials can live up to high expectations of that trust? Some may think so.

[_We disagree._](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf92/134673f2/b7aafa0/69963146/2890120855/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B3_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Michael's track record matches his positions over the last decade because he's not announcing policies for the purpose of flashy campaigning.

Voters are looking for an authentic and steady candidate who has the toughness and the clarity to the beat Donald Trump. That candidate is Michael Bennet.

[**He is going to win this election like he 's won the rest - by presenting a compelling and unifying vision for our country.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf92/134673f2/b7aafa0/69963146/2890120855/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B3_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

We can fix our broken politics, clean up corruption, and strengthen our democracy - it all starts here with this campaign.

[**Michael needs your support today, friend.
