name: Dan Baer
subject: Suspending my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan for Colorado
body:
a message from Dan
|
---
[ ](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827d9/232dfd1/825f27a/62a1c38a/3827481806/VEsH/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.danforcolorado.com")

| | Friend, Today I am suspending my campaign for the U.S. Senate and endorsing John Hickenlooper as the candidate who will beat Cory Gardner next November. We must win this seat! Brian and I are so grateful to those who have joined this campaign--from across Colorado and all fifty states, DC, and Puerto Rico. In less than five months, over 10,000 grassroots donors have fueled our campaign. In our first quarter we raised more grassroots money than any other candidate in this race and our total of well over $1m broke a record for the highest first quarter raise of any LGBTQ candidate for House or Senate in US history. At every parade, every workplace, every backyard conversation or county Democrats meeting, this campaign has been a joyful expression of values-- of a commitment to life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness for every person. Our country is ready for a new, diverse generation of leaders who will drive the kind of change that will help Americans look to the 21st century with confidence and hope rather than looking back at the 20th century with white-washed nostalgia. And I commit to help elect fresh voices in 2020. When Amendment 2 passed in Colorado in 1992, I was fifteen. I thought it meant I might never be happy or have a career. Less than three decades later, I have been an educator, a U.S. Ambassador, and a cabinet secretary for my home state, all with my husband by my side. Others fought for the progress that made my life's story possible-- I can't be cynical about the possibility of making progress through politics. Breaking barriers is rarely achieved by one campaign. And it's never only one person who rises to meet a moment. We are in this together, the fight for progress goes on, and I hope to continue to serve Colorado and our country on the road ahead. Thank you so much, Dan [**P.S. Click here to watch a video message from Dan.**](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827d9/232dfd1/825f27a/62a1c38b/3827481806/VEsE/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E8Ke8AzgZzs&feature=youtu.be") |
---
[](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827d9/232dfd1/825f27a/62a1c388/3827481806/VEsF/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://www.facebook.com/DanForColorado/") [](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827d9/232dfd1/825f27a/62a1c389/3827481806/VEsC/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://twitter.com/danbbaer")

Colorado is the most important Senate race in the entire country according to Nate Silver and CNN. It's our only chance of flipping the Senate. And to win the most important Senate race, we need the most qualified candidate.

Dan served as an Ambassador under President Obama and as the head of the Colorado Department of Higher Education in Governor Hickenlooper's cabinet. If elected, he would be the first openly gay man to serve in Senate history.
|
If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827d9/232dfd1/825f27a/62a1c38e/3827481806/VEsD/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/s/fewer-emails"). We hope you'll consider sticking with us long-term. But if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](https://go.danforcolorado.com/page/m/5fb827d9/232dfd1/825f27a/62a1c38f/3827481806/VEsA/?g=JnF4Cq_HJ6FcyTX3h0hkK5A "https://go.danforcolorado.com/unsubscribe").

| | Paid for by Dan for Colorado

---

subject: A reminder about tonight's debate:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado

| Friend, I'm looking forward to watching tonight's third presidential debate--this time with friends. And I can't wait to hear some great ideas about how we move our country forward.

But here's a quick reminder: No matter how many good ideas a Democratic president brings to the Oval Office on Day 1, we'll have a hard time getting them done _unless we take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell_.

**That starts with beating Cory Gardner and flipping seats like this one right here in Colorado --that's one reason I'm in this race. And if we all step up, we _can_ get it done. name: ElizabethWarren.com
subject: What Elizabeth won't be talking about tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
On the day of Elizabeth's first debate, our campaign received more than 20,000 grassroots donations -- almost half of which came from first-time donors. Today, we want to beat that number | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529d55/45c30650/130938a85/6688293f/3555881444/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
In just a few hours, Elizabeth will be on the debate stage in Houston.

**Here's what we know Elizabeth _won't_ be talking about:**

Nibbling around the edges. Quick fixes. Letting corporations slide and letting special interests take over our government.

This moment in history requires more than just blaming Trump for the problems we face, and Elizabeth has plans to fix them.

But Elizabeth can't make big, structural change alone -- she's counting on grassroots donors to make it possible.

**On the day of Elizabeth's first debate, our campaign received more than 20,000 grassroots donations -- almost half of which came from first-time donors. Today, we want to beat that number -- and we think we can do it with your help.**

[**We need 521 people from Pennsylvania to chip in before the debate to stay on track to hit this goal. Can you be one of the 521?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529d55/45c30650/130938a85/6688293e/3555881444/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUozNUZfREVCX0JTQ19DXzIwMTkwOTEyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ35F_DEB_BSC_C_20190912_V1S1_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Whether it's canceling student loan debt, solving the climate crisis, or her latest plan to provide the biggest increase in Social Security benefits in decades, Elizabeth has a plan to level the playing field.

That's what this campaign is all about: making sure that our economy works for everyone. For too long, the wealthy have had a strong hold on Washington, giving themselves tax breaks while leaving working families in the dust.

**That ends under a Warren administration, and with your help, we can make it happen.**

[**Will you chip in for the first time and make one of the 521 contributions we need from Pennsylvania before the debate starts? We're fighting for big, structural change, and we're counting on grassroots donors to make it possible. Even $3 makes a difference.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529d55/45c30650/130938a85/6688293e/3555881444/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUozNUZfREVCX0JTQ19DXzIwMTkwOTEyX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ35F_DEB_BSC_C_20190912_V1S1_P")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I'm walking onto the Houston debate stage in a couple hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Sharing a personal note from me before we go live tonight for the Democratic debate. | [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=245%2E377263%2EJfOBLA) Friend -- In a couple hours I will walk onto the debate stage in Houston. I hope I make you proud. This is a truly incredible moment. I grew up the son of immigrants, reading sci-fi and comic books as a child, not dreaming of the White House. But now our campaign is on the upswing. Just yesterday, a poll was released showing us at 5% in New Hampshire. That’s huge. Now we need to capture all of this momentum as our campaign rises, and take our important message to every voter. That’s where you come in. My team tells me we’re trying to hit 10,000 grassroots contributions before the debate -- and right now we’re still short. [Friend, will you be the one that puts us over the top by pitching in now? We only have a couple hours left and I would love to walk onto the debate stage knowing we hit this goal. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7951?t=2&akid=245%2E377263%2EJfOBLA) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7952?t=3&akid=245%2E377263%2EJfOBLA)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7953?t=4&akid=245%2E377263%2EJfOBLA)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7954?t=5&akid=245%2E377263%2EJfOBLA)
---
| | [$100 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7955?t=6&akid=245%2E377263%2EJfOBLA)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7956?t=7&akid=245%2E377263%2EJfOBLA)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7957?t=8&akid=245%2E377263%2EJfOBLA)
---
This is our time. This is our moment. Let’s seize it together.
\- Andrew
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/7951?t=9&akid=245%2E377263%2EJfOBLA)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=10&akid=245%2E377263%2EJfOBLA) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=11&akid=245%2E377263%2EJfOBLA) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY

name: Jonathan Smith
subject: Where is Bevin going?
disclaimer_text: paid for by taxpayer dollars
body:
A big report dropped on Tuesday that Bevin has been taking the state plane all over the US, making stops in Wisconsin, Georgia, and even Miami.
|
---

| | Peter,

**What is Matt Bevin hiding?**

A big report dropped on Tuesday that Bevin has been taking the state plane all over the US, making stops in Wisconsin, Georgia, and even Miami. And he's refusing to tell us what he did on those trips, even though they were paid for by taxpayer dollars. That's right -- **Matt Bevin is jet-setting across America on Kentucky 's dime.** He's treating the state plane like his own private jet.

Unlike Matt Bevin, we're running a grassroots campaign funded by small-dollar donations, so we spend a lot of time driving across Kentucky. We need your help to fuel this campaign -- **will you donate now to help us buy a tank of gas for the campaign car?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a9f/ad6dc73/14293a60/db475e0/1442531711/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bevintrips?express_lane=true&refcode=20190912nd__253__&amount=5")** **[DONATE $10](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a9f/ad6dc73/14293a60/db475e7/1442531711/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bevintrips?express_lane=true&refcode=20190912nd__253__&amount=10")** **[DONATE $25](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a9f/ad6dc73/14293a60/db475e4/1442531711/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bevintrips?express_lane=true&refcode=20190912nd__253__&amount=25")** **[DONATE $50](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a9f/ad6dc73/14293a60/db475fa/1442531711/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bevintrips?express_lane=true&refcode=20190912nd__253__&amount=50")** **[DONATE $100](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a9f/ad6dc73/14293a60/db475f9/1442531711/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bevintrips?express_lane=true&refcode=20190912nd__253__&amount=100")** **[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a9f/ad6dc73/14293a60/db475ff/1442531711/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bevintrips?refcode=20190912nd__253__")**
Bevin's secretive use of the state plane is just another example of how he thinks the rules don't apply to him. He gives his buddies government jobs with huge salaries. He refuses to enforce the law that could've helped pay the Blackjewel miners. And now, he won't tell Kentuckians why he took the state plane for his trip to Miami.

That all ends on day one of a Beshear/Coleman administration. Andy and Jacqueline are committed to restoring transparency to Frankfort, and that means no more taxpayer-sponsored secret flights. **[Donate today to make that a reality on November 5th.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a9f/ad6dc73/14293a60/db475fc/1442531711/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI1MyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bevintrips?refcode=20190912nd__253__&amount=10")**
Thanks,
Jonathan
---

State law prohibits contributions from corporations; from any person contributing another person's funds; from foreign nationals who lack permanent resident status; and from state government contractors. By contributing, you affirm that your contribution is from your personal funds and not from funds otherwise prohibited by law. To comply with state law, we must use best efforts to obtain, maintain, and submit the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals and their spouses, when personal contributions exceed $100 per election cycle. Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019. Lindy Karns, Treasurer._

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Radicals, Resistance, and Revenge
body:
There are few voices broadcasted on television that are fearlessly honest.
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347648-804728-4644624-0d77b1868a-4c2f6e3319)
Patriot,

[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347648-804728-4644623-6855f3f2dd-4c2f6e3319) There are few voices broadcasted on television that are fearlessly honest.

One of those voices is Judge Jeanine Pirro.

And I was honored to be mentioned in her new book, _Radicals, Resistance and Revenge – The Left’s Plot to Remake America_.

Here’s what she had to say:

> “When Laura Loomer, a conservative activist who broadcasts her views primarily through Twitter, criticized Representative Ilhan Omar for being “anti-Jewish,” she was banned from Twitter for hate speech. Loomer is an extremely bright, quick-witted millennial, who tears into anything she sees as un-American or anti-Semitic, consequences be damned. Having been banned from social media, she is suing Twitter, Facebook, and Google. There is talk of her running for Congress in 2020.”
[](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347648-804728-4644625-6e9f6a8daa-4c2f6e3319)
And since Judge Jeanine wrote that about me, I made the decision to run for Congress in Florida’s 21st Congressional District to unseat a member of the Democrat Establishment, Lois Frankel.

[**And I’d like your support to win this race. Donate here.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347648-804728-4644623-6855f3f2dd-4c2f6e3319)

Our first filing deadline with the Federal Election Commission is coming up at the end of this month.

Liberal reporters will be standing by with anticipation to download that first report with hopes that my campaign has raised very little money.

They will have the headline pre-written, “Laura Loomer’s Campaign Fails to Garner Support.” Other reporters who don’t bother to hide their liberal agenda will write, “Loomer Campaign a Joke.”

I’d like your help in not just proving them wrong, but by **raising enough campaign funds that it will SHOCK them**.

[**Please help me do that before the deadline passes.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347648-804728-4644623-6855f3f2dd-4c2f6e3319)

I’ve learned to be strategic in the world of politics, so I can’t let it leak how much money our campaign has raised until we file . . . but we are VERY close to hitting the “shock” goal that the liberal media can’t ignore – and that will also get the attention of the National Republican Congressional Committee who will be my biggest partner when I win my primary.

[**Help me reach that internal goal now, by donating as much as you can today.**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347648-804728-4644623-6855f3f2dd-4c2f6e3319)

With the filing deadline approaching with the FEC, I’m running out of time to hit that goal – but [**every dollar you can donate**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347648-804728-4644623-6855f3f2dd-4c2f6e3319) gets me closer to filing a report that will **shock the left** , and have them scrambling as they realize that my campaign isn’t just real, but it’s competitive.

[**Donate Here**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-347648-804728-4644623-6855f3f2dd-4c2f6e3319)
Thank you again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-347648-804728-84585d41bbe610b-4c2f6e3319)

name: Tina Smith
subject: Make sure your name is on this, friend >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Did you know in 28 states and D.C. childcare costs more than a year of public college? Join me in demanding Congress make childcare more affordable.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190912childcare2-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team -

This shouldn't be difficult.

Early childhood development is the most crucial element to a child's success. And yet, what is holding many children and families back is the cost of childcare.

No parent should have to choose between financial security or finding care for their kids. But the reality is that working families across our country are having to make that decision. And as a result, our whole country suffers.

If we want a stronger future for the next generation, it has to start here. That's why I am proud to be joining fellow legislators and progressive organizations in calling for immediate action to lift up these families.

**We set a goal of 50,000 people signing our petition -- and we still need 18,693 more. We need YOUR voice to make this a national priority. **

**[Friend, will you join fellow legislators and me to tell Congress to take action on making childcare affordable for working families? Add your name right now>>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc414df/c1f7015/678de81d/11464d84/971609259/VEsE/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/affordable-childcare/smith/?source=em190912childcare2-b&recurring=auto")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc414df/c1f7015/678de81d/11464d84/971609259/VEsF/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/affordable-childcare/smith/?source=em190912childcare2-b&recurring=auto")** The future of Minnesota and our country lies in working families with preschool and pre-K access, expanded paid family leave, and quality, affordable childcare options. But for too many families, these are just not possible.

Congress can make affordable childcare a reality right now, but it's not a priority.

**I truly believe that when we come together, we can make a difference for working families in Minnesota and across the country. So let's raise our voices to urge Congress to act now for our children.**

**[Together, we can do this. Add your name today to tell Congress to take action to make affordable childcare a reality for working families.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc414df/c1f7015/678de81d/11464d84/971609259/VEsC/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/affordable-childcare/smith/?source=em190912childcare2-b&recurring=auto")**

Thank you for standing with me on this,

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190912childcare2-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc414df/c1f7015/678de81d/11464d86/971609259/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). body:

**Tonight,** each candidate will appear on the same debate stage for the first time this year. With the primary race heating up, here at Our Revolution HQ we want to know what our supporters think about the current state of the race before the front runners face off tonight.

[Take our short survey before 8:00 pm ET tonight to let us know your thoughts on the 2020 Democratic presidential primary race so far ->](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=6+-+Take+our+short+survey+before+800+pm+ET+t&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SURV_180DO_190912_2_2&source=OR_EM_SURV_180DO_190912_2_2")

We are in a pivotal moment in American history. The 2020 election will define the future of our country -- and in the face of the climate crisis, our entire planet.

That is why it's so important for Democrats to elect a candidate who will not only defeat Donald Trump, but one who is prepared to lead an unprecedented grassroots movement capable of standing up to Wall Street, the health insurance companies, and the fossil fuel industry.

[Tell us what issues you're most concerned about as we head into 2020 and let us know your thoughts on what Democrats must do to enact transformative change ->](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=7+-+Tell+us+what+issues+yoursquore+most+conc&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SURV_180DO_190912_2_2&source=OR_EM_SURV_180DO_190912_2_2")
[Answer Here](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=8+-+Answer+Here&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SURV_180DO_190912_2_2&source=OR_EM_SURV_180DO_190912_2_2")
---
Change has always happened from the bottom up, and over the last 3 years, Our Revolution members have led the fight to transform the political life of this country precinct by precinct, county by county, state by state.

[Friend, that is why we want to hear from you. Answer our short survey before 8 pm ET tonight to make your voice heard.](https://go.ourrevolution.?g=VxYBEFDdY9BVUu7uMX4ing "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/september-debate-survey?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=22123&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ourrev&utm_content=9+-+FIRSTNAMEFriend+that+is+why+we+want+to+h&utm_campaign=OR_EM_SURV_180DO_190912_2_2&source=OR_EM_SURV_180DO_190912_2_2")

In Solidarity,

Our Revolution

body:
---
| | [**TRUMP: I 'm personally traveling to New Mexico to FLIP it red ** ](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b2/18e32a7f/52ca8455/7be4b919/3485111597/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190912_em_fr_b2_brl4s_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=25") Quickly -- Trump just made an unprecedented play for New Mexico.

\- His team just announced they want to open headquarters in New Mexico
\- They're flooding the state with cash to register tons of Republican voters
\- And in 96 hours, Trump himself will personally travel here for a massive rally

**This is one of the biggest moves Republicans have ever made to steal this state from Democrats.**

So Ben Ray's launching an immediate defense.

He needs 237 gifts before midnight to fund his critical response. Will you rush $14? | | ****[**Chip in $14 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4b2/18e32a7f/52ca8455/7be4b91e/3485111597/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190912_em_fr_b2_brl4s_all&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=true&amount=14")****

name: Team Weld
subject: fwd: you’re fired
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCHFoLga1lZYZhT5tMvcnfQE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190912_fr&n=1) Team — we wanted to make sure you saw this headline: [](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCHFoLga1lZYZhT5tMvcnfQE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190912_fr&n=2) Not only has Secretary Ross threatened to fire scientists for contradicting President Trump’s false statements on Hurricane Dorian’s path, but it looks like _**President Trump himself was the one who put him on the case to ‘clarify’ the forecast.**_ Folks in the White House, in the midst of a Hurricane, were trying to silence subject matter experts and scientists from telling the American people the truth about the storm’s path. All to protect Trump’s ego. **This is an outrage.**_And — again —_ _another example of what is at stake in 2020, and another reason why our movement_ MUST _succeed in next year’s election._ [**But if we’re going to win our fight to reclaim the Republican Party and restore dignity to the presidency, we need to know that you’ve got our back. Can you rush a donation of $20.20 right now to help us win this fight?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCHFoLga1lZYZhT5tMvcnfQE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190912_fr&n=3) — Team Weld | | [HELP TEAM WELD ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCHFoLga1lZYZhT5tMvcnfQE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190912_fr&n=4)
---
\---- Forwarded message ----
**From** : Team Weld <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : September 10, 2019
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCHFoLga1lZYZhT5tMvcnfQE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190912_fr&n=5)
Team —
Amidst Trump’s false claims about Hurricane Dorian’s path, and his subsequent attempts to prove that he was correct, it looks like — according to _the New York Times_ — Secretary of Commerce Wilbur Ross threatened to fire experts to stop folks from discrediting Trump’s erroneous statement.
After Trump tweeted out falsely that Dorian was headed towards Alabama, the National Weather Service office in Birmingham sent a tweet correcting the record and contradicting the president. According to the reporting, **_this led Secretary Ross to threaten to fire scientists in charge of providing Americans, our government, and first responders with accurate forecasts of natural disasters._**
This politicization of science, fact, and truth has got to stop. We can not have the president and his henchmen interfering with the work of subject matter experts, **_especially when people’s lives are on the line._**
These childish games have real-world consequences, they impact how states and localities prepare for disasters, and impact the faith Americans have in their government.
This is just another example of what is at stake in 2020, and another reason why we need our movement to succeed in next year’s election. But if we want to make President Trump a one-term president, **we’re going to need your help.**
[**Can you chip in $20.20 right now to show President Trump and Secretary Ross that you’re sick and tired of them playing political games with the truth?**](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCHFoLga1lZYZhT5tMvcnfQE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190912_fr&n=6)
— Team Weld
| [DONATE ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U2164LbVVIXSC8SRdPUkPdQc-sU6tLMdh2szY6Q3NMVyCHFoLga1lZYZhT5tMvcnfQE&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190912_fr&n=7)
---
Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.weld2020.org/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190912_fr&n=8).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190912_fr&n=9) or [Facebook](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190912_fr&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190912_fr&n=11), software for leaders.

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: we’ve been warned about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Do you ever find emails from the Holcomb Crew in your spam inbox? Our team has
been alerted to the possibility of political bias in email delivery,

<>
Friend,

Do you ever find emails from the Holcomb Crew in your spam inbox?

Our team has been alerted to the possibility of political bias in email
delivery, and we wanted to make sure your correspondence with Governor Holcomb
is not being affected.

After an investigation during the 2018 midterm elections, a study showed that
Republican candidates faced more instances of spam placement than Democrat
candidates did.
<>
Unfortunately, this pattern emerged in every race tracked during the study.

The Holcomb Crew wants to make sure that we are not being affected by these
same patterns – and you can help. All you have to do is add the Holcomb Crew to
your Gmail contacts – that way messages from Gov. Holcomb will always show up
in your main inbox. Follow the steps below to add the Holcomb Crew to your
Gmail Contacts list.
<>
1. Open any email from the Holcomb Crew. (Note: It might be in your spam
folder.)

2. Click the 3 Dotted Button next to the Reply Button.

3. Click “Add Holcomb Crew to Contacts List”

This is all you have to do to make sure that messages from Gov. Holcomb appear
at the top of your inbox. Thank you for helping us stay in touch with you!

- Holcomb Crew

Contributions by corporations and labor organizations are limited to $5,000
annually; contributions by individuals, LLCs and political committees are
unlimited. Contributions are not deductible as charitable contributions.
Contributions from foreign nationals are prohibited. You may also contribute by
check made out to "Eric Holcomb For Indiana" and mailed to 101 W Ohio Street,
Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204.

Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2019. All rights reserved.

Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN
46204 | (317) 569-0709

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe
<http://links.holcombforindiana.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_s=63feef5b7143431187a7bf148ae7be25&_t=XcSw0NjLoHlDFQActR1WlQ3-T1_fwt-A2UBnPAGmySsWp8s0BzOkl8IMw1OlhS3V4cqFA47WYByQXlrGZL0YxlEmTCVMuJ0b_i4ZyoBb4-ainKD2wmdNRLCcULFDJYw8hbMltkZMMqjvlAAWrPPLncx4dMHvCi9w91nsfa4KFIE%3D>

name: Official Bennet Campaign HQ
subject: what you won't see
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| [Here's what you won't see from us in this race:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf91/134673f2/b7d003b/699632f3/2306081980/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[You won't see Michael flip flopping](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf91/134673f2/b7d003b/699632f3/2306081980/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") on universal healthcare, because he released his plan to finish the work that Obamacare started by building a strong public option and supporting union-negotiated private plans a decade ago.

[You won't see Michael back down](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf91/134673f2/b7d003b/699632f3/2306081980/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") from passing a lifetime ban on members of Congress becoming lobbyists after they leave office because he's been championing the legislation since he was first elected to office, and he knows it's absolutely crucial.

[You won't see Michael mince words](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf91/134673f2/b7d003b/699632f3/2306081980/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000") about inequality in our education system while he fights to ensure universal preschool and reimagine high school and community colleges.

[**You also won 't see Michael on the debate stage tonight, _but you should_ , because when it comes down to the issues that matter most, his policies are where the American people are.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaf91/134673f2/b7d003b/699632f3/2306081980/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/octoberdebate?refcode=EM_FR_B4_091219_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**If you want to see an authentic and steady candidate who has the toughness and clarity to beat Donald Trump, that candidate is Michael Bennet. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Trump "jokes" about a third term
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, While celebrating a narrow victory in North Carolina, Trump couldn't help himself and tweeted a photo of a campaign sign that read "Trump - Keep America Great! - 2024." This is not the first time Trump has joked about or mentioned staying on longer than two terms. Besides the fact that he's not going to win a second term, a third term is specifically banned by the Constitution \-- although we all know Trump doesn't think the law applies to him. This isn't funny or amusing \-- this madman in the White House has got to go. He places everyone on the planet in danger with his quixotic bullying and rash, poorly thought-out decisions. He doesn't listen to his advisors, he cozies up to dictators, and he wants to trash the Earth. We cannot give him the chance to stay on longer and do even more damage. Democrats have the power to begin impeachment proceedings, but they're dragging their heels, so please let us know: **Should we impeach Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd79/6e9863e8/14b349cf/1db0c769/3481513498/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/JH2uJkz") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd79/6e9863e8/14b349cf/1db0c769/3481513498/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/JH2uJkz") Thank you for answering our question, -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd79/6e9863e8/14b349cf/1db0c768/3481513498/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190912c.ND-b&refcode2=3E7Fk70UoFvE9Y7B7UQP")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
body:
In the Oval Office yesterday, President Donald J. Trump announced bold action from his Administration to combat a new type of addiction.

https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8b4f83311d&e=3ee4985eea
The White House • September 12, 2019

** A disturbing trend affecting 5 million American children
------------------------------------------------------------
In the Oval Office yesterday, President Donald J. Trump announced bold action from his Administration to combat a new type of addiction threatening American families.

“We have a problem in our country. It’s a new problem. It’s a problem nobody really thought about too much a few years ago, and it’s called ‘vaping,’” the President said. “And the parents don’t know too much about it.”

About 8 million adults use e-cigarettes today—but so do 5 million American children. “An entire generation of children risk becoming addicted to nicotine because of the attractiveness, appeal-ability, and availability of these vaping products,” Health and Human Services Secretary Alex Azar said.

Watch: Trump Administration removes all flavored e-cigarettes from the market. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6b7c2d9344&e=3ee4985eea)

To protect our children and ensure that e-cigarettes return to their original function—helping adults gradually overcome nicotine addiction from tobacco products—President Trump has authorized the Food and Drug Administration to finalize rules that ban the sale of all flavored e-cigarettes.

The President’s actions come as a result of new data, not yet released, from the National Youth Tobacco survey. Secretary Azar briefed the President and First Lady on the new report yesterday, which shows a surge in adolescent usage of e-cigarettes. It also confirmed that children are drawn to flavored e-cigarette products in particular.

The ban will cover all non-tobacco flavored e-cigarettes, which includes bubblegum, fruit, alcohol, mint, and menthol flavored products.

See the chart First Lady Melania Trump shared on child e-cigarette usage. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc00d40bb5&e=3ee4985eea)

More: “Melania Trump calls for government action against e-cigarettes” (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1e34e41f9b&e=3ee4985eea)

** Remembering the heroes of United Flight 93
------------------------------------------------------------
While President Trump and the First Lady led a moment of silence on the White House South Lawn yesterday, Vice President Mike Pence and Second Lady Karen Pence traveled to Shanksville, Pennsylvania, to visit the Flight 93 National Memorial. The memorial stands on the very ground where the plane crashed 18 years ago. The President and First Lady visited the site last year.

Vice President Pence: A “common field” became a “field of honor forever” (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af3d55976e&e=3ee4985eea)

On a beautiful Tuesday morning 18 years ago, Flight 93 left Newark Airport bound for San Francisco, carrying 40 heroic passengers and crew members from across our country. Within 81 minutes of takeoff, their lives would be taken from us. The heroic actions they took in that short time frame have earned them a place of honor in history.

“America was attacked on September the 11th, but America took the fight back to our enemies on that very same day, not on some foreign battlefield, but right here in the skies above these fields, where the heroes of Flight 93 were forged,” the Vice President said.

“History records they ran forward. They charged toward the cockpit. At 10:03 a.m., Flight 93 plummeted to the Earth.”

Today, the names of these 40 men and women are etched in marble in that field, the Vice President explained. “I want to assure their precious families, they’re also carved into the hearts and the memory of the American people.”

Learn more about the Flight 93 National Memorial. (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b6235e834a&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 More: President Trump and the First Lady at the Pentagon 9/11 ceremony (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e3f2d4a3cd&e=3ee4985eea)

** Video of the day: First Lady at the Kennedy Center
------------------------------------------------------------

https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=53c9aff04c&e=3ee4985eea

First Lady Melania Trump recently helped dedicate the REACH, a new immersive learning theater at the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts in Washington, D.C.

As Honorary Chair of the Kennedy Center, Mrs. Trump opened the exhibit with remarks at the Center’s new Welcome Pavilion. “This is a momentous occasion for the arts,” she said. “The Kennedy Center has always been a powerful tool to bring people together. This new addition will be so valuable to Washington D.C. and is so important to our community and to our nation as a whole.”

** Photo of the Day
------------------------------------------------------------
Official White House Photo by Tia Dufour
Vice President Mike Pence addresses State and local officials from Arizona, California, Colorado, Hawaii, Nevada, New Mexico, and Utah at the White House State Leadership Day in the South Court Auditorium | September 12, 2019

Privacy Policy (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0e24e8ebab&e=3ee4985eea) | Contact the White House (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dfd6b79cb4&e=3ee4985eea) | Unsubscribe (https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=8ab6bfb095)

============================================================
The White House . 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW . Washington, DC 20500 . USA · 202-456-1111

I'll keep this short because they're about to call me onto stage, but to say I'm thrilled to be back in New Hampshire is an understatement!

My Democratic challengers may be getting ready to debate each other, **but the only people whose opinions I care about are yours.**

I'm honored to spend my time hearing directly from you, and I can't wait to serve you as your next President.

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47d1/4bd7760e/4224dfa5/77e1094a/3202322549/VEsEAQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=24+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190912_CongChallenger_U2_X6&source=314_EM_FR_190912_CongChallenger_U2_X6")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you.
